rationale: The citing paper’s contribution is about gender performance gaps in business-school courses and causal instructor-gender effects, while the cited paper is about weather-driven affect and hedonic consumption with gender moderation—there is no clear construct, method, or benchmark overlap in the notes beyond a broad “gender differences” theme. This looks most consistent with an incidental/background mention rather than a core dependency.
